name: FINAL — Gentle Handoff, One Shared Light
notes: The thread's finale: soft-relay mechanic re-tuned by the user's Coupling 28→3 dial move — one light only, ever. Plays the full 14s cycle via SMIL (travel → handoff bloom → conic edge-glow wears the light down the nav border → decay to dark → depart), with opacity crossfades at identical coordinates so no frame shows two lights; a static annotated layer (numbered phases, dashed travel paths, handoff ring) keeps the story legible with animation frozen. Captured offline at operator instruction (no studio round 2 — see brainstorm.md Completion block).
